Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' that is followed by 'Accepted + In Progress' within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants with performance duration below the median variant duration
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' occurrences in cases that include the activity 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of 'Accepted + Assigned' to 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Number of variants where 'Accepted + Assigned' occurs more than once
Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' executed by resources also involved in 'Completed + In Call' activities
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in high-impact (High or Medium) cases compared to low-impact cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Accepted + Assigned' that do not reach 'Completed + Closed' or 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases where 'Completed + Closed' does not happen

Name: Number of times 'Accepted + Assigned' directly precedes a waiting state (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', etc.)
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities that occur in the first half of their respective process variants
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants whose final activity is 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
